nodes.context: Crime family of Cosa Nostra operating in Ramacca, Sicily, involved in extortion, public contracts, and political influence.
Sicilian Mafia organization of which the Ramacca Mafia family is a member.
Mafia faction from Corleone, Sicily, with ties to Ramacca Mafia family head Calogero Conti.
Mafia family from Caltagirone, Sicily, allied with Ramacca Mafia family.
Mafia family from Catania, Sicily, allied with Ramacca Mafia family.
Mafia family from Corleone, Sicily, allied with Ramacca Mafia family.
Mafia network with influence in Ramacca, as revealed by 2025 ROS operation.

edges.evidence_quote: The Ramacca Mafia family is a crime family of the Cosa Nostra
edges.context: Ramacca Mafia family is a constituent family of Cosa Nostra.

edges.evidence_quote: He also maintained significant ties with the Corleonesi
edges.context: Ramacca Mafia family head Calogero Conti had significant ties with the Corleonesi.
